'''√sh-l-p''' ('''shalapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zephyr|zephyr]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-l-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zephyr|zephyr]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √sh-l-p
|-
! Lemma
| shalapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shalapithi|shalapithi]] || [[word:shalapiji|shalapiji]] || [[word:shalapishi|shalapishi]] || [[word:shalapi|shalapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shalaputhuth|shalaputhuth]] || [[word:shalapujuj|shalapujuj]] || [[word:shalapushush|shalapushush]] || [[word:shalap|shalap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shalaputhu|shalaputhu]] || [[word:shalapuju|shalapuju]] || [[word:shalapushu|shalapushu]] || [[word:shalapu|shalapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shalapufuth|shalapufuth]] || [[word:shalapufuj|shalapufuj]] || [[word:shalapufush|shalapufush]] || [[word:shalapuf|shalapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shalapethe|shalapethe]] || [[word:shalapeje|shalapeje]] || [[word:shalapeshe|shalapeshe]] || [[word:shalape|shalape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shalapothoth|shalapothoth]] || [[word:shalapojoj|shalapojoj]] || [[word:shalaposhosh|shalaposhosh]] || [[word:shalap|shalap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shalapotho|shalapotho]] || [[word:shalapojo|shalapojo]] || [[word:shalaposho|shalaposho]] || [[word:shalapo|shalapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shalapofoth|shalapofoth]] || [[word:shalapofoj|shalapofoj]] || [[word:shalapofosh|shalapofosh]] || [[word:shalapof|shalapof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shalapïf|shalapïf]] || [[word:shalapïf|shalapïf]] || [[word:shalapïf|shalapïf]] || [[word:shalapïf|shalapïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shalapïfïf|shalapïfïf]] || [[word:shalapïfïf|shalapïfïf]] || [[word:shalapïfïf|shalapïfïf]] || [[word:shalapïfïf|shalapïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shalapïf|shalapïf]] || [[word:shalapïf|shalapïf]] || [[word:shalapïf|shalapïf]] || [[word:shalapïf|shalapïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shalapïf|shalapïf]] || [[word:shalapïf|shalapïf]] || [[word:shalapïf|shalapïf]] || [[word:shalapïf|shalapïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shalapæthæ|shalapæthæ]] || [[word:shalapæjæ|shalapæjæ]] || [[word:shalapæshæ|shalapæshæ]] || [[word:shalapæ|shalapæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shalapathath|shalapathath]] || [[word:shalapajaj|shalapajaj]] || [[word:shalapashash|shalapashash]] || [[word:shalap|shalap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shalapatha|shalapatha]] || [[word:shalapaja|shalapaja]] || [[word:shalapasha|shalapasha]] || [[word:shalapa|shalapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shalapafath|shalapafath]] || [[word:shalapafaj|shalapafaj]] || [[word:shalapafash|shalapafash]] || [[word:shalapaf|shalapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shalapasha|shalapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalapasha|goshalapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalapasha|gokishalapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shalapnüsha|shalapnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalapnknüsha|goshalapnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalapnüsha|gokishalapnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalapshësha|shalapshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalapnkshësha|goshalapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalapshësha|gokishalapshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalaprosha|shalaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalapnkrosha|goshalapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalaprosha|gokishalaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalapmusha|shalapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalapnkmusha|goshalapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalapmusha|gokishalapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalapsherasha|shalapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalapnksherasha|goshalapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalapsherasha|gokishalapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalapngasha|shalapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalapnkngasha|goshalapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalapngasha|gokishalapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalapyasha|shalapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalapnkyasha|goshalapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalapyasha|gokishalapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalapyamasha|shalapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalapnkyamasha|goshalapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalapyamasha|gokishalapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalapnüshësha|shalapnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalapnknüshësha|goshalapnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalapnüshësha|gokishalapnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalapnürosha|shalapnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalapnknürosha|goshalapnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalapnürosha|gokishalapnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalapnümusha|shalapnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalapnknümusha|goshalapnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalapnümusha|gokishalapnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalapshënüsha|shalapshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalapnkshënüsha|goshalapnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalapshënüsha|gokishalapshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalapshërosha|shalapshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalapnkshërosha|goshalapnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalapshërosha|gokishalapshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalapshëmusha|shalapshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalapnkshëmusha|goshalapnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalapshëmusha|gokishalapshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalapronüsha|shalapronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalapnkronüsha|goshalapnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalapronüsha|gokishalapronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalaproshësha|shalaproshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalapnkroshësha|goshalapnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalaproshësha|gokishalaproshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalapromusha|shalapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalapnkromusha|goshalapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalapromusha|gokishalapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalapmunüsha|shalapmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalapnkmunüsha|goshalapnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalapmunüsha|gokishalapmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalapmushësha|shalapmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalapnkmushësha|goshalapnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalapmushësha|gokishalapmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalapmurosha|shalapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalapnkmurosha|goshalapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalapmurosha|gokishalapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shalap|shalap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:shælæp|shælæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshalap|hoshalap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoshælæp|hoshælæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshalap|hohoshalap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshælæp|hohoshælæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüshalap|nüshalap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüshælæp|nüshælæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüshalap|nünüshalap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüshælæp|nünüshælæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïshalap|nïshalap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïshælæp|nïshælæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïshalap|nïnïshalap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïshælæp|nïnïshælæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushalap|lushalap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lushælæp|lushælæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushalap|lulushalap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushælæp|lulushælæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishalap|lishalap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lishælæp|lishælæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishalap|lilishalap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishælæp|lilishælæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshalap|koshalap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koshælæp|koshælæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshalap|kokoshalap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshælæp|kokoshælæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshalap|keshalap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keshælæp|keshælæp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshalap|kekeshalap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshælæp|kekeshælæp]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
